sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15228" key="a(rmateu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἁρμᾰτ-εύω</orth>, <sense id="n15228.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">drive a chariot,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0006.tlg016.perseus-grc1:994" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">994</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
